title: DDD domain development workflow: ddd.pack + kernel extensions
description: Add complete DDD (Domain-Driven Design) development flow to spec-graph. Includes: ddd.pack with strategic design artifacts (context-map, ubiquitous-language), tactical design artifacts (aggregates, domain-events), DDD-specific checks (bounded-context-boundary, aggregate-invariant), and gate patches. May require kernel extensions for context map relationship types and domain event versioning.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
